ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "orbital_pattern" TEXT /* Orbital pattern of the satellite */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the satellite data */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  "last_orbit_adjustment" TEXT /* Date of the last orbit adjustment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "orbit_inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the satellite's orbit */,
  "orbit_altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the satellite's orbit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_systems" (
  "radar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar system */,
  "radar_name" TEXT /* Name of the radar system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the radar system */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the radar system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the radar system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the radar system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the radar system (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "range_km" REAL /* Maximum range of the radar system in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the weather model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time of the forecast */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "forecast_location" TEXT /* Location for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "forecast_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view forecast, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validation_time" TEXT /* Time of validation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being quality controlled */,
  "quality_control_date" TEXT /* Date of quality control */,
  "quality_control_time" TEXT /* Time of quality control */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality control */,
  "control_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_controller_id FOREIGN KEY ("controller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
